chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2545 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.12046/2014. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2025 Mr. Farmanullah Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Dr. M. Khalid Hayat, advocate alongwith Mr. Muhammad Arshad, advocate for the respondent No.4. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Tariq Shaikh, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-II, FBR, Karachi. Mr. Murtaza Nizamani, Deputy Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-II, HQ, FBR, Karachi. Learned Commissioner is here and states that impugned demand / notice herein is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to right of the department to initiate any proceedings against the petitioner as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof, petition’s counsel states that petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Presence and assistance of officer is duly appreciated. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
